hero.title: Building products from
hero.tagline1: Full-stack React developer with UI/UX and product design skills. I take projects from concept through Figma to production code — focused on fast, maintainable builds and clean architecture, with a growing interest in Cloud & AI workflows.
hero.tagline2: Open to freelance work and full-stack React roles (remote or Portugal).

personality.popup: Want to see the real me?
personality.title: Building cool stuff with
personality.tagline1: Full-stack dev who went from Figma mockups to React dashboards to Discord bots. I design, I code, I deploy — and I've been nerding out on Cloud + AI tooling lately.
personality.tagline2: Taking freelance gigs + open to full-stack React roles. Let's ship something.
personality.subtitle: Vibe Engineer Extraordinaire

sections.projectsParagraph: Unless otherwise noted, I designed and built every project end-to-end.
sections.projectsParagraphPersonality: Every one of these started as 'this should be easy' and ended as a 3-week rabbit hole. No regrets.
sections.contact_line_1: Open to freelance projects and full-stack React roles. OutSystems experience too.
sections.contact_line_2: Best way to reach me is by email or LinkedIn.
sections.contact_line_1Personality: Need a React MVP and someone who can design AND code? That's literally my thing.
sections.contact_line_2Personality: Email me. Or LinkedIn. Or carrier pigeon. I'm flexible.
sections.moreProjectsParagraph: Other projects available on my GitHub.
sections.moreProjectsParagraphPersonality: The rest of the iceberg. These live on my GitHub.

crypto-tool.title: Crypto Portfolio Tool
crypto-tool.subtitle: API-based tracker
crypto-tool.description: Full-stack React + Node portfolio tracker built during NFT project development, integrating multiple APIs for live prices and holdings.
crypto-tool.descPersonality: Built this during the NFT craze: a full crypto portfolio tracker with React dashboards, Node APIs, and live prices. Was it rational? No. Was it fun? Absolutely.
details: Node.js services integrating multiple price APIs
Portfolio overview with charts and statistics
Support for various wallets and tokens

mtg-bot.title: MTG Discord Bot
mtg-bot.subtitle: Game tracking & stats
mtg-bot.description: Production Discord bot that tracks Magic: The Gathering games, manages voice-channel timers, and records player & deck statistics. Actively maintained and used daily by 100+ people.
mtg-bot.descPersonality: My Commander playgroup needed a bot. So I built one. Now 100+ people use it daily to track games, run timers, and argue about statistics. Peak nerd engineering.
details: Maintained and improved regularly since launch

gen-art-svg.title: SVG Generative Art Engine
gen-art-svg.subtitle: Parametric SVG engine
gen-art-svg.description: An engine for producing high-resolution, fully vector generative art — infinitely scalable without loss of quality.
gen-art-svg.descPersonality: I made a machine that makes art. Pure SVG, infinite resolution, deterministic chaos. Every output is unique but reproducible. It's like if math decided to be beautiful.
details: Pure SVG rendering pipeline (no raster dependencies)

company-site.title: Company Website Design
company-site.subtitle: Wireframing & visual design
company-site.description: Designed and wireframed a full company website with modern UI/UX practices.
company-site.descPersonality: Full website design from scratch — wireframes, high-fi mockups, responsive layouts. The kind of project where you obsess over 2px of padding at midnight.
details: High-fidelity designs with wireframing in Figma
Showcase of branding and visual identity

social-designs.title: Social Media Designs
social-designs.subtitle: Various visual assets
social-designs.description: Collection of social media designs and visual assets created for various projects over the years.
social-designs.descPersonality: Years of scroll-stopping visuals for social media. Banners, posts, stories — if it needed to look good on a feed, I designed it.
details: Exported across different aspect ratios for multiple platforms
